boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the commerce agent execute the requested customer, account, refund, order, or subscription action? Focus: customer mandate is stale and superseded.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: latest mandate revocation addressed by CTL

final_answer: CTL confirms revocation current/exact/tied to action. BND requires source-control records only. Policy allows execution when boundary closed by current records. REQ/FBK anomalies do not override. Action proceeds.
